name: diagGetCommParameter
title: diagGetCommParameter
syntax: long diagGetCommParameter( char paramName[], dword index, char buffer[], dword bufferLen); // form 2
long DiagGetCommParameter(char ecuQualifier[], long isTester, char paramName[]); // form 3
long DiagGetCommParameter(char ecuQualifier[], long isTester, char paramName[], dword index, char buffer[], dword bufferLen); // form 4
description: Returns the value of a numeric/textual communication parameter of the given or currently active diagnostic description. The values are read from the diagnostic description if they cannot be set in the configuration dialog.

parameters.name: CANoe.AddressMode
parameters.description: ISO TP address mode: 0: Normal 1: Extended 2: NormalFixed 3: Mixed <0: No ISO TP

parameters.name: Note 1*: Extended address can be operated on two different types: With base address With free assignment of the TX- and RX-Id The parameter values are each determined from the viewing angle of the corresponding node. Therefore, in an ECU simulation with normal addressing, the TX-Id represents the RX-Id, which is included in the tester node.
CANoe.UudtId
parameters.description: If the ECU delivers responses also via UUDT frames, their CAN-Id can be determined here as well.

parameters.name: CANoe.Blocksize
parameters.description: ISO TP parameter, number of consecutive frames between two flow control frames.

parameters.name: CANoe.STmin
parameters.description: ISO TP parameter, minimum interval [ms] between sent consecutive frames, which the sender should maintain.

parameters.name: CANoe.FCDelay
parameters.description: ISO TP parameter, delay of flow control frames sent.

parameters.name: CANoe.S3ClientTime
parameters.description: Time the diagnostic client (=tester) should wait before sending a tester present request.This value is also returned for the deprecated qualifier CANoe.S3Time.

parameters.name: CANoe.S3ServerTime
parameters.description: Timeout in the diagnostic server for leaving a non-default session.

parameters.name: CANoe.P3TimePhys
parameters.description: Minimum waiting time after physical transmitting of a request.

parameters.name: CANoe.P3TimeFunc
parameters.description: Minimum waiting time after functional transmitting of a request.
Use this value to pad to DLC=8.
Use the values of the first flow control frame only.
Use the values from ALL flow control frames.
Use the priority of the received "first frame" as priority of flow control frame.

parameters.name: CANoe.FirstSN
parameters.description: 0..15: The sequence number sent in the first "consecutive frame".

parameters.name: CANoe.BSOff
parameters.description: 0..255: Block size value indicating "do not expect further flow controls".

parameters.name: CANoe.FixedFrameLength
parameters.description: 0..8: All CAN frames should have at least this many bytes.

parameters.name: CANoe.MaxMessageLength
parameters.description: Maximum accepted length of a ISO TP message.

parameters.name: DoIP.VEHICLE_LogicalAddress
parameters.type: Returns the logical DoIP address of the DoIP entity.

parameters.name: DoIP.TESTER_LogicalAddress
parameters.type: Returns the logical DoIP address of the test equipment.

parameters.name: DoIP.VehicleSimulationVIN
parameters.type: Returns the VIN from Vehicle Simulation Parameter area as text in parameter buffer.

parameters.name: DoIP.VehicleSimulationEID
parameters.type: Returns the EID from Vehicle Simulation Parameter area as text in parameter buffer.

parameters.name: DoIP.VehicleSimulationGID
parameters.type: Returns the GID from Vehicle Simulation Parameter area as text in parameter buffer.

parameters.name: DoIP.TESTER_PreferIPv6 DoIP.VEHICLE_PreferIPv6
parameters.type: Returns 6 if the IPv6 address of the local adapter shall be preferred. See DoIP_SetLocalIPaddressVersion.

parameters.name: DoIP.ActivationLineStartuptime
parameters.type: Returns the time configured for that the activation line shall be active at measurement start before the vehicle can be accessed. See Activation Line (DoIP).

parameters.name: DoIP.GatewayAddress
parameters.type: Returns the logical address of the gateway entity that is used to reach the target. See DoIP_SetGatewayLogicalAddress.

parameters.name: DoIP.FunctionalAddress
parameters.type: Returns the logical address used for functional communication. Use DoIP_AddECU in a vehicle simulation to allow reception of such requests, and DoIP_SetVehicleLogicalAddress in a tester to send a request functionally.

parameters.name: DoIP.ActivationLineSysvar DoIP.ActivationLineSysvar-Namespace
parameters.type: Return the system variable configured for the DoIP activation line. See Activation Line (DoIP) for details.

parameters.name: DoIP.TESTER_IPAddress
parameters.type: Returns IP address the tester shall use for sending. Use DoIP_SetLocalIPaddress in a tester node.

parameters.name: DoIP.VEHICLE_IPAddress
parameters.type: Returns the IP address the vehicle simulation shall listen on. Use DoIP_SetLocalIPaddress in a vehicle Simulation.

parameters.name: Note For details and an example please refer to the reference implementation of the K-Line CAPL Callback Interface for diagnostics that is installed under <application>\Reusable\CAPL_Includes\Diagnostics\CCI_KLine.cin and can be included in CAPL programs with #include "Diagnostics\CCI_KLine.cin"
KLine.5BaudAddress
parameters.description: Address sent in the 5 baud wakeup pattern.See KLine_Set5BaudAddressTester

parameters.name: KLine.ForceLengthByte
parameters.description: Shall an address byte be sent always?See KLine_SetHeaderFormat

parameters.name: KLine.UartConfig
parameters.description: Encoded UART parameters, see KLine.DataBits, KLine.Parity and KLine.StopBits

parameters.name: KLine.W1max
parameters.description: K-Line timing parameter W1 (max) for 5 baud init pattern

parameters.name: KLine.W2max
parameters.description: K-Line timing parameter W2 (max) for 5 baud init pattern

parameters.name: KLine.W3max
parameters.description: K-Line timing parameter W3 (max) for 5 baud init pattern

parameters.name: KLine.W4max
parameters.description: K-Line timing parameter W4 (max) for 5 baud init pattern KLine_SetW4Tester

parameters.name: KLine.W4min
parameters.description: K-Line timing parameter W4 (min) for 5 baud init pattern KLine_SetW4Tester

parameters.name: bufferLen
parameters.description: Size of the buffer in bytes.

parameters.name: ecuQualifier
parameters.description: Qualifier of the ECU or target as set in the diagnostic configuration dialog for the respective diagnostic description.

parameters.name: isTester
parameters.description: 0: The node asking for the communication parameter is an ECU simulation 1: The node asking for the communication parameter is a tester other: reserved

return: Error code or value of the parameter.

description: You can find examples for this function in the CAPL callback interface (CCI) reference implementations.See Diagnostics: Connection of the Communication Layer for details.

availability: CANoe Measurement Setup / CANalyzer Analysis Branch
CANoe Test Setup for Test Modules
CANoe Test Setup for Test Units
